name: js-webview-private
description: High-performance UI window manager based on WinBox engine.
author: Aleksandr Kilyakov (@Kilyakus)

scripts.obfuscate:js: javascript-obfuscator ./src/js/webview.js --output ./dist/js/webview.min.js --config obfuscator.json && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const banner = fs.readFileSync('./src/js/webview.js', 'utf8').match(/\/\*\*[\s\S]*?\*\//)[0]; const min = fs.readFileSync('./dist/js/webview.min.js', 'utf8'); fs.writeFileSync('./dist/js/webview.min.js', banner + '\n' + min);"
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run copy:img && npm run minify:css && npm run obfuscate:js && npm run copy:pkg
scripts.deploy: npm run build && gh-pages -d dist -r https://github.com/kilyakus/js-webview.git -b main
